title: The Union Territories (Direct Election to the House of the People) Act, 1965
full_text: The Union Territories (Direct Election to the House of the People) Act, 1965 संघ राज्‍यक्षेत्र (लोक सभा प्रत्‍यक्ष निर्वाचन) अधिनियम, 1965 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196549 Act Number: 49 Enactment Date: 1965-12-22 Act Year: 1965 Short Title: The Union Territories (Direct Election to the House of the People) Act, 1965 Hindi Title: संघ राज्‍यक्षेत्र (लोक सभा प्रत्‍यक्ष निर्वाचन) अधिनियम, 1965 Long Title: An Act to provide for direct election in certain Union territories for filling the seats allotted to them in the House of the People and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 22-12-1965 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Union Territories (Direct Election to the House of the People) Act, 1965 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Direct election to fill the seats in the House of the People allotted to certain Union territories. Section 4. Repealed. Section 5. Repealed. Section 6. Provision as to sitting member.
